data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Royalty tracking per booking (6% to franchisor)', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case outlines the royalty structure, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's ability to track and report the 6% royalty per booking. The absence of specific API reads or persisted state checks related to royalty calculations indicates a clear gap in the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality to track and report the 6% royalty per booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for royalty tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system correctly calculates and reports the 6% royalty per booking.
